items.title: Keep secrets server-side
items.example: Browser hits `/api/chat` (your Node endpoint) which uses `process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY` to call OpenAI. The key never lands in browser JS or network responses.

items.title: Choose one module system
items.avoid: Mixing require and import ad hoc.
items.example: `package.json`: `"type": "module"`. Every file uses `import`/`export`. CJS-only deps still work via dynamic `import()` or default-import interop.

items.title: Protect the event loop
items.avoid: Long synchronous CPU work on the main thread.
items.example: Embedding 10k docs locally? Move into a `Worker` thread (or run an embedder service). The HTTP handlers stay snappy; the slow work happens off the main thread.

items.title: Standardize scripts
items.example: Every project exposes `npm run dev`, `npm run build`, `npm run start` — onboarding is uniform; CI scripts don't drift between repos.
